title: MedicalCare App

requirements.text: Implement a complete alternative visual design (Design B) for the Mobile Health Care App inspired by the provided Figma link, including a coherent color palette (avoid blue/purple), typography, spacing system, component styling, and layout rules applied consistently across the app UI.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly distinct theme from a typical default template is applied (colors, type scale, surfaces, buttons, inputs, cards).
All user-facing text is in English.
Styling is consistent across screens (no mixed palettes or mismatched typography).

requirements.text: MedicalCare App with at least these routes/pages: Welcome/Onboarding, Sign In, Home/Dashboard, and Profile; each page should be navigable via in-app navigation (tabs and/or header navigation) and should demonstrate the Design B component system.
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the listed screens exists and can be navigated to from within the app.
Screens use realistic placeholder content (names, dates, specialties) without requiring backend integration.
No broken navigation links; route changes render the correct screen.

requirements.text: Add a simple in-app toggle or switcher that allows viewing the alternative Design B UI (and, if an existing design is present, switching between the default design and Design B) without editing any immutable template files.
acceptanceCriteria: A user can switch to view Design B styling/layout during runtime.
The switcher does not require changes to immutable paths (e.g., hooks and UI component source directories marked read-only).

requirements.text: Generate and add the required static images for the Design B theme under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the Design B UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at the specified paths under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Design B screens render the images correctly without fetching them from the backend.

constraints: Do not edit any files under frontend immutablePaths (including frontend/src/main.tsx and frontend/src/components/ui). Compose existing UI components instead of modifying their sources.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor; do not introduce additional backend services or external databases.
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Reproducing the exact Figma design pixel-for-pixel.
Implementing real medical workflows (e.g., booking, payments, messaging, prescriptions) unless explicitly requested later.
Adding third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported).

required: Minimal healthcare app logo mark, rounded geometry, warm green + neutral palette (healthcare-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Welcoming hero illustration: clinician and patient in a calm clinic setting, flat/soft gradient style, warm green palette (healthcare-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
Set of 6 simple line icons: doctor, heart, pills, chat bubble, user profile; consistent stroke width (healthcare-icons.dim_512x512.png)
